candidate_definition_hints.text: This plugin adds image support to Neovim using [Kitty's Graphics Protocol](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/graphics-protocol/) or [ueberzugpp](https://github.com/jstkdng/ueberzugpp).

candidate_glosses.text: This plugin adds image support to Neovim using [Kitty's Graphics Protocol](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/graphics-protocol/) or [ueberzugpp](https://github.com/jstkdng/ueberzugpp).

source_context_snippet: This plugin adds image support to Neovim using [Kitty's Graphics Protocol](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/graphics-protocol/) or [ueberzugpp](https://github.com/jstkdng/ueberzugpp).
